{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/98734964?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/0xEr3n", "id": 98734964, "login": "0xEr3n", "node_id": "U_kgDOBeKTdA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xEr3n", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48157", "cvss": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact

If an application uses `HttpException::setTitle()` and/or `setDescription()` to include untrusted/request-derived data in the error title or description (e.g. `"No products found matching '{$query}'."`), an attacker could inject arbitrary HTML/JavaScript that executes in the victim's browser when they encounter an HTML error page generated by Slim.

The vulnerability is present even with `displayErrorDetails = false` as the unescaped title and description are rendered on this error path.

Built-in exceptions (`HttpNotFoundException`, `HttpBadRequestException`, etc.) ship plain-text defaults, so a vanilla Slim app with no user code is not exploitable. Only applications that feed untrusted data into `setTitle()` and/or `setDescription()` are affected.

### Patches

The issue is fixed in 4.15.2.

### Workarounds

Without upgrading, applications can:

- Avoid passing untrusted/request-derived data into `HttpException::setTitle()` and `setDescription()`. Use static, plain-text error copy instead.
- Register a custom error renderer (an `ErrorRendererInterface` implementation, or a subclass of `HtmlErrorRenderer` that escapes the title and description) for the HTML media type.

### Acknowledgments

Slim is grateful to and thanks GitHub user [0xEr3n](https://github.com/0xEr3n) for reporting this issue.

### Resources

- CWE-79: https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/79.html", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00167, "percentile": 0.06206}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T21:54:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48157"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-15T22:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-06-23T21:54:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/slimphp/Slim/security/advisories/GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48157", "https://github.com/slimphp/Slim/releases/tag/4.15.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/slimphp/Slim/security-advisories/GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/slimphp/Slim", "summary": "Slim has Reflected XSS in the HtmlErrorRenderer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T21:54:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-53h4-8rc4-f539", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.15.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "slim/slim"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.4.0, <= 4.15.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Slim has Reflected XSS in the HtmlErrorRenderer
